title: Roasted Oozy Mediterranean Minced Vegetable Pasta
description: A peppery and chewy mediterranean dish perfect for date nights, featuring a vegetarian-friendly mince mix seasoned with dates, olives, and herbs. Long-fermentation dough creates an interesting texture that pairs well with the savory vegetable mixture.
instructions: Combine minced meat, olive oil, onions, garlic, paprika, salt, and pepper in a mixing bowl. Mix until well combined and form into small patties.
Roll out long-fermentation dough into thin sheets. Cut circles slightly larger than the mince patties to use as wrappers for your veggie mixtures.
Place each patty on top of a wrapped dough circle, spread evenly with tomatoes and olives. Add dates and basil leaves over them.
Bake in preheated oven for 25 minutes. Serve hot with lemon wedges or drizzled olive oil.
Enjoy your peppery and chewy mediterranean dish!
